title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Max Healthcare International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Max Healthcare International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Max Healthcare International Enterprises is actively seeking a talented and motivated Medical Officer to join our dynamic team in Tiruchirappalli. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Max Healthcare International Enterprises:
Max Healthcare International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Coding

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Max Healthcare International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
